prose: Fukui reactivity indices were computed for pyridine (11 atoms: N, 5×C, 5×H) using the chemkit fukui-reactivity skill. Method: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard'), PySCF RKS backend, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Partial charges via Mulliken (PySCF). The N±1 cation (q=+1, m=2) and anion (q=−1, m=2) SCFs were run alongside the neutral to compute finite-difference Fukui indices. Geometry: user-supplied pyridine.xyz, not re-optimized. Integrity: trustworthy=true, all checks passed (sum(f+)=1.0000, sum(f-)=1.0000). No warnings reported. Most electrophilic site: N (atom 1), f+ = 0.48423. Most nucleophilic site: C4 (atom 4), f- = 0.11826. Full per-atom Fukui indices (f+, f-, f0, dual descriptor) are reported in the preceding table.
